name: Execute a Contract Method
description: This action will execute one of the Contract Methods you have defined in your 1Shot API account and create a Transaction.

fields.label: Choose the Contract Method you want to execute
Enter the parameters for the Contract Method
fields.helper_text: This must be in JSON format. For example, a "mint" method's params may look like this: {"amount":"10000","to":"0x3e6a2f0CBA03d293B54c9fCF354948903007a798"}. This must be at least an object, {}

fields.label: Enter any text you want included with the Transaction as a memo
fields.helper_text: This may be anything you want, including technical information you want to save. Many people use JSON here.

fields.label: What is the maximum amount of gas to use?
fields.helper_text: 1Shot API calculates this for you in most circumstances, but some complex transactions may need more gas.

fields.label: How much native token should be sent with the Transaction?
fields.helper_text: Enter a value only for "payable" contract methods that need to send native token to the smart contract.

name: Execute a Contract Method as a Delegator
description: This action will execute one of the Contract Methods you have defined in your 1Shot API account and create a Transaction, using a delegation on file.

fields.label: Choose the Contract Method you want to execute
Choose the Delegator address
fields.helper_text: Select the address that you want to execute the contract method as.

fields.label: Enter the parameters for the Contract Method
fields.helper_text: This must be in JSON format. For example, a "mint" method's params may look like this: {"amount":"10000","to":"0x3e6a2f0CBA03d293B54c9fCF354948903007a798"}. This must be at least an object, {}

fields.label: Enter any text you want included with the Transaction as a memo
fields.helper_text: This may be anything you want, including technical information you want to save. Many people use JSON here.

fields.label: How much native token should be sent with the Transaction?
fields.helper_text: Enter a value only for "payable" contract methods that need to send native token to the smart contract.

fields.label: What is the maximum amount of gas to use?
fields.helper_text: 1Shot API calculates this for you in most circumstances, but some complex transactions may need more gas.

fields.helper_text: In case of auto mode, make sure to keep it less than cool set point while maintaining heat/cool delta. The field is optional, if cool mode is being used then leave to default.

fields.label: Cool Set Point
fields.helper_text: In case of auto mode, make sure to keep it greater than heat set point while maintaining heat/cool delta. The field is optional, if heat or aux mode is being used then leave to default.

fields.helper_text: In case of auto mode, make sure to keep it less than cool set point while maintaining heat/cool delta. The field is optional, if cool mode is being used then leave to default.

fields.label: Starting Cool Set Point
fields.helper_text: In case of auto mode, make sure to keep it greater than heat set point while maintaining heat/cool delta. The field is optional, if heat or aux mode is being used then leave to default.

name: Create or update a subscriber
description: This action will create a new subscriber or update a subscriber.

fields.label: Email
fields.helper_text: The subscriber's email address.

fields.label: New email for existing subscriber?
fields.helper_text: Optional. Use only to change an existing subscriber's email to a new email address.

fields.label: First Name
fields.helper_text: Optional. The subscriber's first name.

fields.label: Last Name
fields.helper_text: Optional. The subscriber's last name.

fields.label: Phone
fields.helper_text: Optional. The subscriber's primary phone number.

fields.label: SMS Number
fields.helper_text: Optional. The subscriber's mobile phone number in E.164 formatting. E.g. "+16125551212". Only US-based numbers are supported at this time.

fields.label: Address 1
fields.helper_text: Optional. The subscriber's mailing address.

fields.label: Address 2
fields.helper_text: Optional. An additional field for the subscriber's mailing address.

fields.label: City
fields.helper_text: Optional. The city, town, or village in which the subscriber resides.

fields.label: State
fields.helper_text: Optional. The state, province, or region in which the subscriber resides.

fields.label: Country
fields.helper_text: Optional. The country in which the subscriber resides.

fields.label: Zip Code
fields.helper_text: Optional. The postal code in which the subscriber resides.

fields.label: Time Zone
fields.helper_text: Optional. The subscriber's time zone (in Olson format). Defaults to Etc/UTC

fields.label: Tags
fields.helper_text: Optional. Enter a tag or comma-separated list of tags to assign

fields.label: Status "active" or "unsubscribed"?
fields.helper_text: Optional. Use only "active" or "unsubscribed" to specify the subscriber's status.

fields.label: Custom Field 1 Key
fields.helper_text: Optional. Add or edit a custom field for the subscriber. Enter existing key or create a new one. Separate words by underscores (E.g. "shirt_size").

fields.label: Custom Field 1 Value
fields.helper_text: Optional. The value for custom field 1.

fields.label: Custom Field 2 Key
fields.helper_text: Optional. Add or edit a custom field for the subscriber. Enter existing key or create a new one. Separate words by underscores (E.g. "shirt_size").

fields.label: Custom Field 2 Value
fields.helper_text: Optional. The value for custom field 2.

fields.label: Custom Field 3 Key
fields.helper_text: Optional. Add or edit a custom field for the subscriber. Enter existing key or create a new one. Separate words by underscores (E.g. "shirt_size").

fields.label: Custom Field 3 Value
fields.helper_text: Optional. The value for custom field 3.

fields.label: Lifetime Value
fields.helper_text: Optional. The lifetime value of the subscriber (in cents).

fields.label: Base Lead Score
fields.helper_text: Optional. An Integer specifying the starting value for lead score calculation for this subscriber. Defaults to 30.

fields.label: User ID
fields.helper_text: Optional. A unique identifier for the user in your database, such as a primary key.

fields.label: IP Address
fields.helper_text: Optional. The subscriber's IP address.

fields.label: GDPR consent "granted" or "denied"?
fields.helper_text: Optional. Use "granted" or "denied" to specify whether the subscriber granted or denied GDPR consent.

fields.label: GDPR Consent Message
fields.helper_text: Optional. The message that the subscriber granted or denied their consent to.

name: Add tag to subscriber
description: This action will add a tag to a subscriber.

fields.label: Email
fields.helper_text: The subscriber's email address.

fields.label: Tag
fields.helper_text: The tag to apply to the subscriber. If the tag does not exist in your account, a new one will be created.

name: Remove tag from subscriber
description: This action will remove a tag from a subscriber.

fields.label: Email
fields.helper_text: The subscriber's email address.

fields.label: Tag
fields.helper_text: The tag to remove from the subscriber.

name: Record an event
description: This action will record an event for a subscriber.

fields.label: Email
fields.helper_text: The subscriber's email address.

fields.label: Action
fields.helper_text: The name of the action taken. E.g. "Logged in"

fields.label: Property1Key
fields.helper_text: Optional. Add an event property (e.g. "trial_length", "amount").

fields.label: Property1Value
fields.helper_text: Optional. The value of the first property.

fields.label: Property2Key
fields.helper_text: Optional. Add an event property (e.g. "trial_length", "amount").

fields.label: Property2Value
fields.helper_text: Optional. The value of the second property.

fields.label: Property3Key
fields.helper_text: Optional. Add an event property (e.g. "trial_length", "amount").

fields.label: Property3Value
fields.helper_text: Optional. The value of the third property.

fields.label: Prospect
fields.helper_text: Optional. If Yes, attaches a lead score to the subscriber (when lead scoring is enabled). Defaults to Yes.

fields.label: OccurredAt
fields.input_type_family: Text input > ISO 8601 date and time
fields.helper_text: Optional. The time at which the event occurred in ISO-8601 format. Defaults to the current time if left blank.

name: Subscribe to campaign
description: This action will subscribe someone to an Email Series Campaign.

fields.label: Email
fields.helper_text: The subscriber's email address.

fields.label: Campaign
fields.helper_text: The campaign to subscribe this subscriber to.

fields.label: Time Zone
fields.helper_text: Optional. The subscriber's time zone (in Olson format). Defaults to Etc/UTC

fields.label: Double Opt-In
fields.helper_text: Optional. If Yes, the double opt-in confirmation email is sent; if No, the confirmation email is skipped. Defaults to the value set on the Email Series Campaign if unselected.

fields.label: Starting Email Index
fields.helper_text: Optional. The index (zero-based) of the email to send first. Defaults to 0 if left blank.

fields.label: Tags
fields.helper_text: Optional. Enter a tag or comma-separated list of tags to assign.

fields.label: Custom Field Key 1
fields.helper_text: Optional. Add or edit a custom field for the subscriber. Enter existing key or create a new one. Separate words by underscores (E.g. "shirt_size").

fields.label: Custom Field Value 1
fields.helper_text: Optional. The value of the first custom field.

fields.label: Custom Field Key 2
fields.helper_text: Optional. Add or edit a custom field for the subscriber. Enter existing key or create a new one. Separate words by underscores (E.g. "shirt_size").

fields.label: Custom Field Value 2
fields.helper_text: Optional. The value of the second custom field.

fields.label: Custom Field Key 3
fields.helper_text: Optional. Add or edit a custom field for the subscriber. Enter existing key or create a new one. Separate words by underscores (E.g. "shirt_size").

fields.label: Custom Field Value 3
fields.helper_text: Optional. The value of the third custom field.

fields.label: Reactivate if previously removed?
fields.helper_text: Optional. If Yes, re-subscribes the subscriber to the campaign if there is a removed subscriber with the same email address. Defaults to Yes.

fields.label: Prospect
fields.helper_text: Optional. If Yes, attaches a lead score to the subscriber (when lead scoring is enabled). Defaults to Yes.

fields.label: Base Lead Score
fields.helper_text: Optional. An Integer specifying the starting value for lead score calculation for this subscriber. Defaults to 30.

fields.label: GDPR Consent
fields.helper_text: Optional. Whether the subscriber granted or denied GDPR consent.

fields.label: GDPR Consent Message
fields.helper_text: Optional. The message that the subscriber granted or denied their consent to.

name: Start Automower®

This action will run your mower for a specified duration after which it will go back to its regular schedule. Automower® will start when the battery is fully loaded.

For AIM-capable mowers, you can also start in a specific area that you have created.

name: Move lights
description: This Action will make your LIXF Z lights move in a pattern.

fields.label: Turn on first?
fields.helper_text: "Yes" will make your lights move, even when they are turned off in the app.

fields.label: Advanced options
fields.helper_text: Want an option that's not available? Specify them here. Example: "fade_in_duration: 5; number_of_moves: 6" for 6 moves fading in a 45 seconds period. More info

name: Turn lights on
description: This Action will turn your lights on.

fields.label: Fade in duration
fields.helper_text: How long should it take for the lights to fade in.

fields.label: Advanced options
fields.helper_text: Want an option that's not available? Specify them here. Example: "color: #ff0000; brightness: 0.3; fade_in_duration: 12" for red at 30% brightness, 12 second fade in. More info

name: Turn lights off
description: This Action will turn your lights off.

fields.label: Fade out duration
fields.helper_text: How long should it take for the lights to fade out.

fields.label: Advanced options
fields.helper_text: Want a custom fade out duration? Set it here. Example: "fade_out_duration: 7200" for 2 hours. More info

name: Toggle lights on/off
description: This Action will turn your lights off if they are on, and turn them on if they are off.

fields.label: Advanced options
fields.helper_text: Want to toggle with a duration? Specify it here. Example: "transition_duration: 5" for a 5 second fade duration. More info

name: Activate scene
description: This Action will activate a Scene.

fields.label: Scene
fields.helper_text: The Scene you'd like to activate

fields.label: Transition duration
fields.helper_text: How long should it take for the lights to transition between colors.

fields.label: Advanced options
fields.helper_text: Want to set a custom duration? Specify it here. Example: "transition_duration: 5" for a 5 second transition duration. More info

name: Change color of lights
description: This Action will change the color of your lights.

fields.label: Turn on first?
fields.helper_text: "Yes" will make your lights turn on to the color, even when they are turned off in the app.

fields.label: Transition duration
fields.helper_text: How long should it take for the lights to transition between colors.

fields.label: Advanced options
fields.helper_text: Want an option that's not in the dropdown? Specify them here. Example: "color: #ff0000; brightness: 0.3; duration: 12" for red at 30% brightness, 12 second fade. More info

name: Blink lights
description: This Action will make your lights quickly blink the color of your choice.

fields.label: Turn on first?
fields.helper_text: "Yes" will make your lights blink, even when they are turned off in the app.

fields.label: Advanced options
fields.helper_text: Want an option that's not in the dropdown? Specify them here. Example: "color: green saturation:0.2; number_of_blinks: 6" for 6 pale green blinks. More info

name: Breathe lights
description: This Action will make your lights slowly breathe the color of your choice.

fields.label: Turn on first?
fields.helper_text: "Yes" will make your lights breathe, even when they are turned off in the app.

fields.label: Advanced options
fields.helper_text: Want an option that's not available? Specify them here. Example: "color: green saturation:0.2; number_of_breaths: 6" for 6 pale green breaths. More info

name: Change Image Background
description:
Changes the background of an image. You can set a new background image or a color. Use this module to apply white background.

Use for all types of product shots: product-only, flat lay, on-model, editorial campaigns. Works perfectly for products, apparel, person, cars, furniture, animals, logos.

fields.helper_text: Source image URL.

fields.label: Background Image URL
fields.helper_text: The background image URL. Don't use with Background Color. Apply either or.

fields.label: Background Color
fields.input_type_family: Text input > Path to a folder
fields.helper_text: Can be a hexcolor code (e.g., #82d5fa, #fff) or a color name (e.g., blue). For semi-transparency, 4-/8-digit hexcodes are also supported (e.g., #18d4ff87). Don't use with Background Image URL.

fields.label: Format
fields.helper_text: Optionally select one of the image formats (JPG is default).

name: Upscale Image
description: The upscale service increases the resolutions of an image by a given upscale factor, without increasing its file size. Upscale increases the quality and resolution of your photos by leveraging predictive and generative AI to add pixels to your image. It works especially well on images without noise.

fields.label: Original Image URL

name: Send me an SMS
description: This Action will send an SMS to your mobile phone.

name: Send SMS
description: This action will send a new SMS.

fields.label: To
fields.helper_text: Recipient(s) – phone numbers and address book entries (groups and contacts). Multiple recipients can be specified separated by comma

fields.label: From
fields.helper_text: Sender - maximum of 11 alphanumeric or 16 numeric characters

fields.label: Debug
fields.helper_text: If activated no SMS will be sent or calculated

fields.label: Delay
fields.helper_text: Date/time for time-delayed SMS	- timestamp or format yyyy-mm-dd hh:ii

fields.label: No Reload
fields.helper_text: Switch off reload lock. This lock prevents the sending of the same SMS (text, type and recipient alike) within 180 seconds

fields.label: Flash
fields.helper_text: Send SMS as Flash SMS. These are displayed directly in the receiver’s display

fields.label: UDH
fields.helper_text: User Data Header - if specified and variable text contains Hexcode, the message will be sent as 8-bit binary SMS

fields.label: UTF8
fields.helper_text: Forces the detection as a UTF8 character set and overrides automatic recognition of the API

fields.label: TTL
fields.helper_text: Time-To-Live - specifies the validity period of the SMS in minutes

fields.label: Label
fields.helper_text: Separate label for your statistics. Allowed characters: a-z, A-Z, 0-9, .-_@

fields.label: Performance Tracking
fields.helper_text: Enable Performance Tracking for URLs found in the message text

fields.label: Foreign ID
fields.helper_text: Provide your own ID for this message. You will get the foreign_id in return back in DLR callbacks etc. Max. 64 chars, allowed characters: a-z, A-Z, 0-9, .-_@

name: Send Voice
description: This action will convert a given text to voice, call a given number and read the text out loud.

fields.label: Text
fields.helper_text: Text message to be read or XML data	in the format of (SSML)[https://docs.microsoft.com/de-de/azure/cognitive-services/speech-service/speech-synthesis-markup]

fields.label: To
fields.helper_text: Recipient - number or contact

fields.label: XML
fields.helper_text: Specifies whether the text variable is a plain text to be read, or an XML format.

fields.label: From
fields.helper_text: Caller ID - use only verified sender IDs, one of your virtual inbound numbers or a shared virtual number

name: Set Thermostat Mode
description: This Action will set thermostat mode of your Thinka devices that support thermostat mode.

name: Create a text post
description: This action will create a text post on Threads.

fields.label: Text
fields.helper_text: The text content you want to post on Threads. Text posts are limited to 500 characters.

name: Create a link post
description: This action will create a link post on Threads.

fields.label: Text
fields.helper_text: The text content you want to post on Threads. Text is limited to 500 characters.

fields.label: Link
fields.helper_text: Enter the link you want to share in your post

name: Create an image post
description: This action will create an image post on Threads.

fields.label: Text
fields.helper_text: An optional text content you want to post with your image. Text is limited to 500 characters.

fields.label: Image URL
fields.helper_text: URL to the image you want to post. Only JPG and PNG images are allowed. Learn more about image specifications here.

name: Create a video post
description: This action will create a video post on Threads.

fields.label: Text
fields.helper_text: An optional text content you want to post with your video. Text is limited to 500 characters.

fields.label: Video URL
fields.helper_text: URL to the video you want to post. Only MP4 and MOV videos are allowed. Learn more about video specifications here.

name: Create a carousel (multiple media) post
description: This action will create a carousel (multiple media) post on Threads. At least two items are required in the carousel.

fields.label: Text
fields.helper_text: An optional text content you want to post with your carousel. Text is limited to 500 characters.

fields.label: First Media Type
fields.helper_text: Select the type of first item in the carousel.

fields.label: First Media URL
fields.helper_text: URL to the first media you want to post. Only MP4 and MOV videos & JPG and PNG images are allowed.

fields.label: Second Media Type
fields.helper_text: Select the type of second item in the carousel.

fields.label: Second Media URL
fields.helper_text: URL to the second media you want to post. Only MP4 and MOV videos & JPG and PNG images are allowed.

fields.label: Third Media Type (OPTIONAL)
fields.helper_text: Select the type of third item in the carousel.

fields.label: Third Media URL (OPTIONAL)
fields.helper_text: URL to the third media you want to post. Only MP4 and MOV videos & JPG and PNG images are allowed.

fields.label: Fourth Media Type (OPTIONAL)
fields.helper_text: Select the type of fourth item in the carousel.

fields.label: Fourth Media URL (OPTIONAL)
fields.helper_text: URL to the fourth media you want to post. Only MP4 and MOV videos & JPG and PNG images are allowed.

name: Actuate an output
description: This action will command a device to turn ON/OFF an output

name: Upload video draft
description: Upload a video to your drafts on TikTok where you can then create and publish a post. Ingredient link from the trigger or query must be a video file and not a page that hosts a video. Max video size is 4GB.

name: Switch on
description: This action will set a boolean Timberwolf object true. You may connect the object on your Timberwolf Server to other services like KNX, 1Wire, Modbus oder MQTT.

fields.label: What Timberwolf Server and object do you want to use?
fields.helper_text: Pick one Timberwolf Server if you have many. A Timberwolf Server might not show up if a connection is not allowed or possible. At least one suitable traget object must be present in the IFTTT subsystem.

name: Switch off
description: This action will set a boolean Timberwolf object false.

fields.label: What Timberwolf Server and object do you want to use?
fields.helper_text: Pick one Timberwolf Server if you have many. A Timberwolf Server might not show up if a connection is not allowed or possible. At least one suitable traget object must be present in the IFTTT subsystem.

name: Set value
description: Set a Timberwolf Server object to a specified value. The selected Timberwolf Server will convert the textual value to the datatype of the target object. You can connect the target object to another subsystem like KNX, 1-Wire, Modbus, MQTT, HTTP or Timeseries

fields.label: What Timberwolf Server and object do you want to use?

name: Create a new Event
description: This action will create a new Timeline Event.

fields.label: Title
fields.helper_text: The title of the Event, that will be created on a Timeline.

fields.label: Timeline ID
fields.helper_text: The Timeline ID, which you can find in the menu of each timeline, under the item "Show Timeline Info".

fields.label: Event At
fields.input_type_family: Text input > ISO 8601 date and time
fields.helper_text: The Event's datetime.  Use a date ingredient here or leave the field empty and the current local time will be used.

fields.label: Description
fields.helper_text: The Event's description.

name: Create a new Event with Values
description: This action will create a new Timeline Event with Values to track.

fields.label: Title
fields.helper_text: The title of the Event, that will be created on a Timeline.

fields.label: Description
fields.helper_text: The Event's description.

fields.label: Timeline Id
fields.helper_text: The Timeline ID, which you can find in the menu of each timeline, under the item "Show Timeline Info".

fields.label: Event At
fields.input_type_family: Text input > ISO 8601 date and time
fields.helper_text: The Event's datetime. Use a date ingredient here or leave the field empty and the current local time will be used.

fields.label: Value
fields.helper_text: The real value after selecting a Value Type. For example, for Value Type Integer: 100, for Decimal: 10.5, for Text: Test or for Boolean: true. More Info

fields.label: Value Title
fields.helper_text: Name by which the value should be tracked. As for example with "Costs: 100$", Costs would be the Value Title. More Info

fields.label: Value Type
fields.helper_text: Timeline Events can track four different values: Integer, Decimal, Text and Boolean. Depending on which Value Type is selected, the Value must also match the Value Type. More Info

fields.label: Unit
fields.helper_text: A key to identify the Value's Unit, e.g. kmh for the Unit kilometers per hour .

name: Turn A/C on
description: This Action will turn your Aros A/C on and set to a temperature you specify.

name: Turn A/C off
description: This Action will turn your Aros A/C off.

name: Set dial label
description: This Action will set a new label on your Nimbus device.

name: Turn outlet on
description: This Action will turn on the Pivot Power Genius outlet you specify. If the outlet is already on, it will remain on.

name: Turn outlet off
description: This Action will turn off the Pivot Power Genius outlet you specify. If the outlet is already off, it will remain off.

name: Toggle on/off
description: This Action will toggle the Pivot Power Genius outlet you specific on or off.

name: Activate shortcut
description: This Action will activate the shortcut you specify.

name: Beep a tag
description: This Action will beep the tag. NOTE: Only compatible with the Motion Sensor Tags with buzzer.

fields.label: Number of times to beep
fields.helper_text: The number of times to beep, beep until stopped or until moved.

name: Stop beeping a tag
description: This Action will stop the tag beeping. This action can also be used to test tag connectivity.

name: Turn on light or switch
description: This Action will turn on LED on the tag or a WeMo device.

name: Turn off light or switch
description: This Action will turn off LED on the tag or a WeMo device.

name: Arm motion sensor
description: This Action arms motion sensor on a tag. Regular angle based motion sensor, Reed KumoSensor and PIR KumoSensor can all be armed using this action.

fields.label: Define closed angle?
fields.helper_text: Only applicable to angle based motion sensor in door/gate mode. If not specified, does not re-define closed angle (requires the tag be armed in door mode at least once)

name: Disarm motion sensor
description: This Action disarms motion sensor on a tag. Regular angle based motion sensor, Reed KumoSensor and PIR KumoSensor can all be disarmed using this action.

name: Enable temperature monitoring
description: This Action will enable temperature monitoring on a tag.

fields.label: Lower threshold in degree Fahrenheit
fields.helper_text: If temperature drops below this "too cold" event will fire. If missing, use value you set in Fahrenheit, otherwise in the app.

fields.label: Upper threshold in degree Fahrenheit
fields.helper_text: If temperature increases above this "too hot" event will fire. If missing, use value you set in the app.

name: Disable temperature monitoring
description: This Action will disable temperature monitoring on a tag.

name: Enable humidity or moisture monitoring
description: This Action will enable humidity or moisture monitoring on a tag. NOTE: Only compatible with Tags with humidity or moisture sensor.

fields.label: Lower threshold in %
fields.helper_text: If humidity/moisture drops below this "too dry" event will fire. If missing, use value you set in the app.

fields.label: Upper threshold in %
fields.helper_text: If humidity/moisture rises above this "too wet" event will fire. If missing, use value you set in the app.

name: Disable humidity or moisture monitoring
description: This Action will disable humidity or moisture monitoring on a tag.

name: Run a KumoApp
description: This Action will start a KumoApp installed under the current user account. If the KumoApp is running, nothing will happen. If a KumoApp does not register any event handler or timer, it will automatically stop after executing the first time, allowing this action to run multiple times without user intervention.

fields.label: KumoApp to run
fields.helper_text: specify installed KumoApp

name: Stop a KumoApp
description: This Action will stop a KumoApp. If the KumoApp is not running, nothing will happen.

fields.label: KumoApp to stop
fields.helper_text: specify installed KumoApp

name: Enable brightness monitoring
description: This Action will enable brightness/ambient light intensity monitoring on a tag. NOTE: Only compatible with Tags with ambient light sensor.

fields.label: Lower threshold in lux
fields.helper_text: If ambient light drops below this "too dark" event will fire. If missing, use value you set in the app.

fields.label: Upper threshold in lux
fields.helper_text: If ambient light rises above this "too bright" event will fire. If missing or 0, use value you set in the app.

name: Disable brightness monitoring
description: This Action will disable brightness/ambient light intensity monitoring on a tag.

name: Update Temperature/Humidity/Lux
description: This action will force an update to read the current temperature, humidity and ambient light (when available).

name: Activate Away mode
description: This action will activate Away mode on Wiser Heat.

name: Turn Wiser Plug on or off
description: This action will turn a Wiser Plug on or off.

name: Set mode
description: This Action will set your Wiser Air Thermostat to Home, Away or Sleep mode. Eco IQ is disabled by running this Action.

name: Set temperature
description: This Action will set your Wiser Air Thermostat to the temperature you specify. Eco IQ is disabled by running this Action.

fields.label: Which temperature?
fields.helper_text: Choose a temperature between 48-91°F or 9-33°C.

name: Set system mode
description: This Action will set your Wiser Air Thermostat to Off, Heat, Cool, or Auto mode. Eco IQ is disabled by running this Action.

name: Change camera mode
description: This Action will change your Withings Home camera mode. To get more information about camera modes, you can go to your app Control Center.

name: Turn on / change light mode
description: This action will turn on the selected light(s). Optionally, a light mode or pre-defined color can be applied, as well as a level of dimming.

fields.label: Which light(s)?
fields.helper_text: This can be the whole home, a room, a group, or a light.

fields.label: What brightness?
fields.helper_text: Select the brightness level of your choice.

name: Turn off the light
description: This action will turn off the selected light(s).

fields.label: Which light(s)?
fields.helper_text: Select the lights you want to turn off.

name: Pulse the light
description: This action will make the selected light(s) pulse gently once.

name: Activate a scene
description: This action will apply the settings of the selected scene to your WiZ lights.

name: Dim / Brighten the light
description: This action will dim / brighten the selected light(s) by the step of your choice. Ideal for your smart remotes, connected buttons, widgets and much more!

fields.label: By how much?
fields.helper_text: Choose by how many points to dim / brighten. (Full brightness is 100)

name: Toggle your lights on/off
description: This action will turn your lights on if they are currently off – and vice versa. An easy way to toggle between on and off statuses!

fields.label: Data to add

name: Turn off device
